title: Creative (brand-side instance, decomposed)
description: Une créa décomposée. Vit à brands/{slug}/creatives/{CRT-NN}.json (créa marque) ou brands/{slug}/competitive-intel/decomposed/{CRT-NN}.json (benchmark concurrent). Une créa = un fichier. Group variantes via concept_id + variant_of. Conforme au canon V3 (resources/templates/creative-formula.md) et à l'équation v3.1 stress-tested S55. Évolution: absorbe 8 champs migrés depuis angle.schema v1.1 (intent, mecanique, seasonality, craft_mode, longevity_signal, cta) audit S55 D#391.

_migration_notes.description: Audit Phase B v2.29.0 (creative/1.0 -> creative/1.1) : (1) `context.persona` drop `buyer_role` / `user_role` (lookup canonique via audience_slug -> profile.json#buyer_user_split), `buyer_user_split` (bool) renomme en `buyer_user_split_signal` (enum cache). (2) `execution.craft_mode` ajoute `minimal_brand_mark` (logo + 1 word badge). (3) `intent` refondu : `B2B_lead_gen` retire, ajout `Lead_gen` / `Retention` / `Awareness` ; nouvelle dimension `audience_segment` (B2C/B2B/B2B2C/DTC/marketplace) extraite. Migration breaking sur `intent` mais aucun consumer downstream (creative.schema cree v1.0 Phase A, pas de data existante).

_equation_ref.const: creative_statique = NOYAU(mecanique × format × stop_scroller × ton) × CONTEXTE(angle × pain_point × persona × proof) × MODIFIEURS(occasion × situation × offer × destination × produit × mix_pillar × campaign × regulatory × seasonality_trigger)
_equation_ref.description: Équation compositionnelle v3.1 stress-tested S55 (23 ads cross-typologies). NOYAU = invariant créa. CONTEXTE = couches stratégiques branchables. MODIFIEURS = override situationnels. Source canon: resources/templates/creative-formula.md.

creative_id.description: CRT-NN format (CRT-01, CRT-12, CRT-103). Stable id, never reassigned.

name.description: Operator-facing label. E.g. 'Le miroir, encore', 'Promo BFCM swap photo'.

audience_slug.description: Primary audience this creative targets. Matches a folder under brands/{slug}/audiences/.

concept_id.description: Concept group identifier shared across variants. E.g. 'cpt_btbdays_freedom_ladder_001'. Two creatives sharing concept_id are variants of the same NOYAU; they differ only via variant_axis.

variant_of.description: concept_id of the parent creative this one is variant of. Null if this is the source/canonical variant.

variant_axis.description: Which dimension was altered to derive this variant from the parent. Null if not a variant.

source.description: Origin of the encoded creative. internal_production = produced by the brand workspace. external_benchmark = competitor decomposition. trendtrack_pull = ingested from a trendtrack feed. manual_drop = operator pasted/described it.

mode.description: Canon V3 §2 classifier (resources/templates/creative-formula.md). concept = abstract creative idea, decomposable. template = repeatable structure with variable slots. asset = concrete deployed instance.

copy_visual_cursor.description: Canon V3 §3 cursor. 0 = pure visual (no verbal layer), 10 = pure copy (verbal-dominated). Conditions Craft.Verbal vs Craft.Visual scoring expectations.

intent.description: Concept-level intent tag. DR = direct response ecom (KPI ROAS, CPP). Brand = brand-building, top-funnel (KPI reach, engagement, brand recall). Hybrid = DR avec investissement brand (KPI ROAS + brand lift). Lead_gen = funnel quiz/email/form capture (KPI form-fill, MQL, SQL, leads). Retention = cible existing customers (KPI repeat purchase, LTV). Awareness = top-funnel pur (KPI reach, video views, brand recall). Audit Phase B v2.29.0 : refonte de `B2B_lead_gen` en `Lead_gen` + ajout dimension `audience_segment` separee pour B2B vs B2C distinction. Conditions la fractale Hook x Body x CTA expectation et les KPI verdict winner.

audience_segment.description: Segment de marche cible. Distinct de intent (qui decrit l'objectif persuasif). Permet de filtrer les KPI et la mecanique narrative. Audit Phase B v2.29.0 : extraction depuis `intent` (B2B_lead_gen -> Lead_gen x B2B).

language.description: ISO language code of the verbal layer.

stop_scroller.description: NOYAU layer: how the creative captures attention in the first 1-2 seconds. Distinct from craft (which is execution polish).

dominance.description: Which layer carries the stop-scroll work. hook_dominant = verbal hook does the lift. visual_dominant = composition does the lift. co_dominant = both contribute equally.

verbal.description: Verbatim hook text on the asset.

pattern.description: Reference to resources/canon/copy/hooks/*.json id, or free string if not yet canonized.

lever.description: Psychological lever activated. E.g. curiosité, identification, peur, gain, exclusion.

description.description: Observable composition. What the eye sees first.

mechanic.description: Reference to resources/templates/creative-mechanics-registry.md id, or free string. NOT enum-locked, registry is the SSOT.

ton.description: Tonal register of the creative. Free string by design (open-ended, not enum). E.g. 'direct response émotionnel', 'premium discret', 'confident funny', 'clinical authoritative'.

mecanique.description: Narrative device of the creative (migrated from angle v1.1, P3+P8 patches v3.1). Free string referencing resources/templates/creative-mechanics-registry.md ids when available. NOT enum-locked: the registry is the canonical source and evolves. Examples: before_after, problem_solution, pov, demo, listicle, comparison, testimonial, founder_talk, native_ui_mock, reveal, statement, meme_cultural, educational_diagram, day_in_life, curiosity_teaser, emotional_reframe.

context.description: CONTEXTE layer of the equation: strategic substrate the creative plugs into. Distinct from NOYAU (the creative grammar itself).

angle_ref.description: Reference to angle.json#angle_id if the angle is encoded brand-side. Null if angle is captured inline only.

angle_inline.description: Inline angle snapshot when not yet encoded as a standalone angle file. Subset of angle.schema fields (formula summary, awareness_movement, lineage hint).

summary.description: One-line phrasing of the pain the creative activates.

modalite.description: explicite = pain stated verbally. implicite = pain echoed without verbalization. absent = creative runs without pain reference. Field renamed v3.2 from 'modalité' (accent) for snake_case strict ASCII compliance.

registre.description: Sensitivity register of the pain. tabou = socially loaded (sex, weight, finance, illness). neutre = factual. soft = aspirational framing.

persona.description: Persona snapshot. Lookup canonique via audience_slug -> profile.json#buyer_user_split. Ce bloc est un cache de signal pour l'instance crea, pas la source canon. Audit Phase B v2.29.0 : drop des champs `buyer_role` / `user_role` (dupliquaient profile), `buyer_user_split` (bool) renomme en `buyer_user_split_signal` (enum cache).

buyer_user_split_signal.description: Cache du type de split buyer/user (lookup canon : profile.buyer_user_split). Permet aux skills downstream de filtrer rapidement sans charger profile complet. Renomme en `_signal` pour clarifier que c'est un cache, pas la source. Drop des champs roles (buyer_role, user_role) qui dupliquent profile.

proof.description: Proof layers stacked on the creative. Order matters (visual hierarchy).

layer_type.description: E.g. chiffre, certif, badge, brevet, testimonial, presse, clinical, regulatory.

content.description: What the proof actually says or shows.

position.description: Where it lives on the asset. E.g. overlay, packshot, corner, body.

modifiers.description: MODIFIEURS layer: situational overrides that condition or override the NOYAU+CONTEXTE for a specific deployment window.

occasion.description: Canon V3 §8 calendar trigger. Time-bound cultural or commercial moment. E.g. Valentine, Ramadan, BFCM, fête des mères, back-to-school.

situation.description: Evergreen contextual moment, NOT calendar-bound. E.g. post-workout, morning routine, before-bed, commute.

offer.description: Active commercial offer attached to the creative. References brands/{slug}/products/{slug}/offers.json when applicable.

destination.description: Where the click lands. E.g. product page, quiz, LP, article.

produit.description: Product scope. Mono-product vs multi-product framing.

mix_pillar.description: Strategic pillar in the brand's creative mix this creative serves.

campaign.description: Campaign label or id this creative ships under.

regulatory.description: Regulatory constraints applied. E.g. FDA disclaimer, ANSM, FTC, CSA. Important for clinical, financial, supplement verticals.

seasonality_trigger.description: Migrated from angle v1.1, P9 patch v3.1. Temporal trigger that conditions the creative's relevance window. Override of occasion when needed (e.g. extended Ramadan campaign window). Null if evergreen.

trigger_name.description: Canonical seasonality name. E.g. back-to-school, mothers-day, bfcm, ramadan.

geography.description: ISO country codes where this seasonality applies.

execution.description: Execution-side variables. Stable across format changes for a given concept. Migrated from angle v1.1 (P6+P10+P1 patches v3.1).

craft_mode.description: Mode de craft creative. product_only = catalog photo zero overlay verbal (DTC fashion default, e.g. AD3 robe DTC reach 4674). minimal_brand_mark = logo + 1 word badge ou wordmark uniquement (cas hybride observe Gymshark). with_overlay = au moins une couche verbale on the image (hook, CTA, claim). Conditionne les attentes Craft.Verbal scoring. Audit Phase B v2.29.0 ajout `minimal_brand_mark` valeur intermediaire.

craft.description: Craft layer scoring substrate. Free strings, synthesized observation per dimension.

visual.description: Composition, focal, palette, typo, espace, forme synthétisé.

cta.description: P1 patch v3.1. CTA modalite (4 values, not 2). Extends previous cta.locus.

modalite.description: explicite = verbal CTA on creative (Get started, Shop now, Apply). implicite_brand = brand recognition does the work, no verbal CTA needed. absent_intentionnel = deliberately no CTA (Brand-led statement, seasonal halo). externalisé = CTA delegated to platform/funnel/landing (paid social norm, ~80% of observed ads). Field renamed v3.2 from 'modalité' (accent) for snake_case strict ASCII compliance.

locus.description: Where the CTA physically lives. in-creative = visible on the asset itself. externalisé = on the platform UI (button), funnel landing, or downstream.

formulation.description: Verbatim CTA wording when explicite or in-creative.

performance.description: Observed performance signals. Append-only test_results, the rest are derived/observed.

longevity_signal.description: P10 patch v3.1, migrated from angle v1.1. days_running > 30 = strong winner proxy. Better signal than absolute reach (which correlates with budget more than intrinsic merit).

winner_proxy.description: Derived from days_running + reach trend. evergreen >30d active. scaling 7-30d with positive reach delta. early <7d. fatigued reach declining. indéterminé insufficient signal.

atome_irreductible.description: The single element without which the creative dies. Diagnostic atom. Useful for variant pruning and override decisions. Field renamed v3.2 from 'atome_irréductible' (accent) for snake_case strict ASCII compliance.

element.description: The word, visual, or composition without which the creative collapses.

delta_si_change.description: Estimated impact if this element is altered or removed. Field renamed v3.2 from 'delta_si_changé' (accent) for snake_case strict ASCII compliance.

tags.description: Taxonomy tags for routing, filtering, retrieval.

validation_status.description: Lifecycle. hypothesis = not yet tested in campaign. tested = ad set launched, results inconclusive. validated = CPA/ROAS confirmed viable. scaled = significant budget allocated. fatigued = performance declining.

created_by_skill.description: Which skill generated this creative. E.g. 'decompose-ad', 'produce-creative-brief'.

decomposed_from.description: Source ad_id when this is a benchmark decomposition (source=external_benchmark).
